subject: Gaming
title: Braid: Puzzle Platforming Redefined
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Braid: Puzzle Platforming Redefined.

hook.text: What if you could rewind time in a platformer? Braid asked that question and changed indie gaming forever.

buildup.text: Jonathan Blow spent three years and $200,000 of his own money building Braid with no publisher support.

discovery.text: Each world introduced a new time mechanic. One world had time flow with your movement. Another had parallel timelines.

twist.text: The final level reveals the story's true meaning through gameplay itself. The narrative is the mechanic.

climax.text: Braid launched on XBLA in 2008 and became the poster child for indie games as art.

punchline.text: Time rewound. A genre redefined. Indie became art in 2008.

quiz.question: How much of his own money did Jonathan Blow invest in Braid?
